ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the grant was awarded */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program under which the grant was awarded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the grant */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the grant */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the grant */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the grant (e.g., awarded, disbursed, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant purpose */,
  "goals_and_objectives" TEXT /* Goals and objectives of the grant */,
  "expected_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the grant */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the program */,
  "review_process" TEXT /* Review process for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategories" TEXT /* Subcategories within the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the recipient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the recipient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the recipient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the recipient */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the recipient */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant associated with the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current review status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  "application_attachments" TEXT /* Attachments to the application (e.g., proposal, budget) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant associated with the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursement was made */,
  "amount_disbursed" TEXT /* Amount disbursed */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., check, direct deposit) */,
  "disbursement_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the disbursement */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment for the disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disbursements_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant associated with the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  "report_attachments" TEXT /* Attachments to the report (e.g., financial statements, photos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., grant officer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the grant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the grant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant associated with the communication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Whether a response is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the metric in the evaluation process */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_review_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant application being scored */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score assigned to the application for the metric */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_review_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES grant_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_review_scores_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)
